theme.description: A crisp, professional, and minimalist e-commerce interface using strictly Navy Blue and White. Emphasizes product imagery with generous whitespace, progressive disclosure, and mobile-first functional bento grids.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 for section padding. Containers must have ample internal padding.

grids.marketing: Bento Grid strategy. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with gap-8 for product catalogs.
grids.dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy. Dashboard uses grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px border-b border-subtle.
surfaces.cards: Flat background (white), 1px solid border-subtle, no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white rounded-none or rounded-md. Hover: bg-primary-hover. Must include clear focus states (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary).
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized: 1px border-subtle, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary. Clean, square or slightly rounded (rounded-md).
components.tables: Minimalist table for admin: hidden vertical borders, subtle horizontal border-subtle, text-sm, distinct th styles (uppercase, text-xs).
components.navigation: Sticky nav at the top. Logo on left, nav links center, cart on right. Visible on desktop.
components.cart: Slide-out sheet or minimal modal for cart view. Clear breakdown of items (Piece vs Box).
components.icons: Use lucide-react (e.g., ShoppingBag, User, LayoutDashboard, Package, Wallet, CheckCircle).

motion.hover: Subtle transform and color transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.
motion.cart_add: Micro-interaction: Button briefly changes to 'Added!' or shows checkmark, cart icon bounces subtly.

hero_banner.description: Flat lay of an elegant cookie box
hero_banner.category: Hero Background or Product Showcase Split

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure navy (#0f172a) on white (#ffffff) meets APCA standard. All text must be readable.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-submit').
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all inputs and buttons (ring-2 ring-primary).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the customer storefront and admin dashboard as two distinct routes or sections. Customer (/) and Admin (/admin).
Use strictly Navy Blue (slate-900) and White. Avoid default grays for buttons/active states; stick to the primary color palette.
Product cards must display the two pricing options clearly: Per Piece (₱45) and Box of 6 (₱260).
Use a ShoppingBag icon from lucide-react for the cart. The checkout form should collect Name, Phone, Address.
For the GCash payment display, use a clean Wallet or Smartphone icon from lucide-react alongside the number 09614841216. Do NOT use placeholder text or generic logo placeholders.
In the Admin Dashboard, implement a mock or simple context-based real-time inventory counter. The Sales Summary should calculate total orders, revenue, and best-selling flavor.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tables, and dialogs, but customize the styling to remove default rounding if it conflicts with the minimalist square/slightly-rounded aesthetic.
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto for headings. Import and use Outfit (Google Fonts) for headings, and DM Sans for body.
Always use the provided image URLs in image_urls. Do NOT use placeholder services like via.placeholder.com.
